entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange aggregation platform routing token swaps across multiple liquidity sources and networks, with intent-based, cross-chain, limit-order, and liquidity protocol components.
entity.notes: HEI models 1inch Network, 1inch Swap, the Aggregation Protocol, the Liquidity Protocol, Fusion-based execution, and chain-specific discovery rows as one exchange entity rather than splitting protocol versions or deployments.

evidence.title: 1inch swap platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party platform describes 1inch as a decentralized exchange aggregator providing token swaps, intent-based execution, cross-chain swaps, and routing across multiple liquidity sources and networks.

evidence.title: 1inch protocol and aggregator metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero 1inch DEX aggregator volume across supported networks, corroborating active exchange operation.
